sentences.arabic: اِجْتَمَعَ رَئِيسُ الدَّوْلَةِ الْيَوْمَ مَعَ وَفْدٍ دِبْلُومَاسِيٍّ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik države se danas sastao sa velikom diplomatskom delegacijom.
sentences.translationEn: The president met today with a large diplomatic delegation.

sentences.arabic: نَاقَشَ الْجَانِبَانِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ التِّجَارِيَّةَ بَيْنَ الْبَلَدَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Dvije strane su razgovarale o trgovinskim odnosima između dvije zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: The two sides discussed trade relations between the two countries.

sentences.arabic: اِتَّفَقَ الْقَادَةُ عَلَى تَعْزِيزِ التَّعَاوُنِ فِي مَجَالِ التَّعْلِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Lideri su se dogovorili o jačanju saradnje u oblasti obrazovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The leaders agreed to strengthen cooperation in the field of education.

sentences.translation: Sastanak je bio pozitivan i koristan za obje strane.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting was positive and beneficial for both parties.
